title: Epic: jmap-chat types.rs upgrades to current spec
description:
## Why
types.rs was written against the OLD spec. The current spec (../jmap-chat-spec/draft-atwood-jmap-chat-00.md) adds new fields, changes field semantics, and adds entirely new type families. All downstream method and client work depends on types being correct first.

## What
Update all data types in crates/jmap-chat/src/types.rs and crates/jmap-chat/src/jmap.rs to match the current spec exactly. MAY fields are treated as SHOULD/MUST.

## Acceptance criteria
- All new fields present with correct Rust types and serde attributes
- All changed fields updated (presence optional, new enum variants)
- RichBody/Span types added with full fixture tests
- Session capability structs added
- All tests pass against hand-written JSON fixtures from the spec
- cargo clippy clean
close_reason: All types.rs and jmap.rs upgrades implemented: new Contact/Chat/PresenceStatus fields, RichBody/Span, WebSocket message types, session capability structs. 91 tests passing, clippy clean.
